title: Bitter Crispy Algerian Mozzarella Stir-fry
description: This one-pot algerian dish features bitter-tasting mozzarella balls cooked until crispy and ready to eat raw.
instructions: Heat olive oil in a pan over medium heat.
Add finely chopped onions and minced garlic, sautéing for about 5 minutes until softened.
Add sliced red peppers to the pan with the onion mixture. Cook for an additional 3-4 minutes.
Increase heat to high, add mozzarella balls directly into the hot pan, tossing gently so they do not stick.
Drizzle balsamic vinegar over the top of the mozzarella and toss again until coated evenly.
Season with salt and pepper as desired.
Serve immediately, garnished with fresh herbs if available.
